name: Saucy Meatballs
recipeIngredient: Cream of Chicken Soup (10 3/4 oz), no dilution
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked meatballs, cream of chicken soup, milk, and nutmeg in a large skillet.
2. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in sour cream; cover and heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
